name: Erik Ahlberg
description:
Erik Ahlberg is the main antagonist of the Netiflix series Hilda, serving as the main antagonist of the second season and the secondary antagonist of its feature film, Hilda and the Mountain King. He is the chief ranger of the Trolberg Safety Patrol.

Erik is a man with balding brown hair and a small, black mustache. His exact age is unknown but he appears to be middle-aged.
creator: AaroncTrust
